expectations.text: Clearly states that Bluetooth (BLE) does NOT work in Expo Go
expectations.evidence: Opening: 'No, Bluetooth scanning will not work in Expo Go.'

expectations.text: Explains why — native module not included in Expo Go's fixed module set
expectations.evidence: 'Expo Go comes with a fixed set of native modules (the Expo SDK), and Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) is not among them'

expectations.text: Recommends switching to a development build (expo-dev-client)
expectations.evidence: 'switch to a development build using expo-dev-client'

expectations.text: Provides specific steps to create a dev build (install expo-dev-client, eas build commands)
expectations.evidence: 4-step sequence with install, build, and start commands

expectations.text: Names a specific BLE library (e.g., react-native-ble-plx)
